violations.text: The establishment was observed to be sealing raw foods (beef bone marrow) in plastic bags. The establishment must submit proper procedures to RIDOH Center for Food Protection for review and approval. Food observed to be raw without any marinades. Person in charge removed food from bags at the time of inspection. Establishment to cease using vacuum packaging until approved by RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Failure to comply may result in further disciplinary action. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
The breakfast menu does not have an allergen statement for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (cheese) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Food was voluntarily disposed of by staff member. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Rice was observed held at 117 degrees Fahrenheit in the hot-holding equipment. Hot-holding equipment was adjusted to a higher temperature. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Person in charge reheated food to over 165 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked (eggs and tuna). New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The establishment was observed to be vacuum packaging cooked foods (chicken, beef, pork, and queso). The establishment must submit proper procedures to RIDOH Center for Food Protection for review and approval. Food voluntarily disposed of by staff due to lack of approved procedures. Establishment to cease using vacuum packaging until approved by RIDOH Center for Food Protection. All vacuum packaging equipment must be removed from premises or further disciplinary action may follow. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged tuna and salmon were observed thawing with the packaging in-tact. Fish was observed at 37 degrees Fahrenheit and removed from the package to properly thaw. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The establishment is lacking a 3-bay sink in the bar area. A sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and SANITIZING EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
